song.title: We Have Come
song.author: Will Reagan
song.lyrics: Misc 1: (Intro) I wanna follow You With all my heart I worship You Godw Ich will Dir folgen Herr, mit allem sein, ich preise Dich Herr Chorus 1: We have come to give You glory We have come to give You praise [V1] You're welcome in this place You're welcome in this place You're welcome in this place [V2] Have Your way Have Your way Have Your way Chorus 2: Bless the Lord oh my soul And let all that's within me shout out shout out For use solely with the SongSelect Terms of Use. All rights reserved. www.ccli.com
